procurement.Purpose / Machine Use: WL-HV-0002 — VOLVO A40G (Hauler Dump Truck) - Hydraulic control valve and hose leaking
procurement.Reason / Issue: Hydraulic control valve and hose are actively leaking on the VOLVO A40G hauler dump truck deployed at Muthaafushi. Machine is operational but losing hydraulic fluid — risk of full system failure if unaddressed.
procurement.Specs Needed: OEM Volvo part — confirm part number from machine plate
procurement.Notes:
OEM Volvo part — confirm part number from machine plate
Symptoms: Visible hydraulic fluid leak at control valve area and along hose run. Possible pressure drop in hydraulic circuit.
Recommended action: Replace hydraulic control valve and the leaking hose section. Flush and top up hydraulic fluid after replacement. Pressure-test system before returning to service.

issueReports.title: Hydraulic control valve and hose leaking
issueReports.description: Hydraulic control valve and hose are actively leaking on the VOLVO A40G hauler dump truck deployed at Muthaafushi. Machine is operational but losing hydraulic fluid — risk of full system failure if unaddressed.
issueReports.symptoms: Visible hydraulic fluid leak at control valve area and along hose run. Possible pressure drop in hydraulic circuit.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Replace hydraulic control valve and the leaking hose section. Flush and top up hydraulic fluid after replacement. Pressure-test system before returning to service.

parts.name: Hydraulic Control Valve
parts.notes: OEM Volvo part — confirm part number from machine plate

parts.name: Hydraulic Hose (high-pressure)
parts.notes: Confirm hose diameter and length on site

issueReports.title: Hydraulic hose burst — machine grounded
issueReports.description: Hydraulic hose burst on the KOMATSU PC350 high bed excavator. Machine is grounded and non-operational. Location needs to be verified with site team before dispatching parts.
issueReports.symptoms: Hose burst — complete hydraulic fluid loss. Machine unable to operate. Grounded as of 7 March 2026.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Identify exact hose spec (diameter, length, fittings, pressure rating) before ordering. Replace burst hose, bleed hydraulic system, refill hydraulic fluid. Confirm machine location first.

parts.name: Hydraulic Hose (burst section)
parts.notes: Confirm hose spec on site — diameter, length, end fittings and pressure rating

parts.name: Hydraulic Fluid (replacement)
parts.notes: Confirm grade from machine manual — ISO VG 46 or 68 typically

issueReports.title: Battery failure and full electrical system rectification required
issueReports.description: KOBELCO SK380 is experiencing battery failure — machine fails to start or hold charge. Full electrical system inspection needed including battery, wiring harness, terminals, and cable connections.
issueReports.symptoms: Machine not starting or starting unreliably. Battery not holding charge. Suspect corroded/damaged battery terminals and wiring. Possible alternator output issue.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Replace battery with OEM-spec unit. Overhaul battery wiring — replace cables, fit new clamps and lugs. Test alternator output after battery replacement. Use crocodile clips for temporary testing during diagnosis.

parts.name: Battery 12V/100A
parts.notes: OEM Kobelco spec — confirm exact amp-hour, terminal position and dimensions from machine plate

parts.name: Battery wires / cable set
parts.notes: Confirm cable size (mm²) and length required on site

parts.name: Battery clamps
parts.notes: Confirm clamp type (+/-) and terminal size

parts.name: Cable lugs
parts.notes: Confirm lug size to match cable size

parts.name: Crocodile clips (set)
parts.notes: For electrical diagnosis and temporary connections during testing

issueReports.title: Excavator bucket play and bush/pin wear
issueReports.description: Excavator bucket has excessive play/vibration indicating worn shims and pins. Bush and pin bolt condition requires inspection. Specific machine not yet confirmed — likely one of the KOMATSU PC350 units.
issueReports.symptoms: Excessive bucket movement/vibration during digging. Audible clunking from bucket linkage. Possible worn bushes at pin joints.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Inspect bucket linkage pins and bushes. Replace shims to eliminate play. Replace lock nuts if worn. Confirm which specific excavator (WL-HV-0005, 0006, or 0007) before ordering to get correct pin sizes.

parts.name: Bucket shims (set)
parts.notes: Confirm machine and shim sizes before ordering

parts.name: Pin bolts with lock nuts
parts.notes: Confirm diameter, length and thread — measure on site

issueReports.resolutionNotes: Asset ID unconfirmed — pending site identification of which excavator

issueReports.title: Workshop MRO tools and maintenance consumables required
issueReports.description: General workshop and maintenance tools needed to support ongoing fleet rectification work across all machines. Includes lubrication equipment, welding tools, cleaning equipment, and basic hand tools. These are not tied to a single machine failure — they are essential MRO stock for the maintenance team.
issueReports.symptoms: Workshop lacks essential maintenance tools to carry out rectification work on fleet. Technicians unable to complete jobs without these items.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Procure all listed MRO items. Store at Thilafushi Base workshop. Welding machine and air compressor are capital items — verify budget approval. All other items are consumables.

parts.name: Grease gun
parts.notes: Confirm manual or pneumatic — recommend manual for site use

parts.name: Welding machine
parts.notes: Confirm power rating (200A/250A) — for repair and fabrication

parts.name: Welding rods (box)
parts.notes: Confirm rod type/size (E6013 typical for general steel)

parts.name: Air compressor
parts.notes: Confirm capacity (CFM) and power supply available on site

parts.name: Compressor hose
parts.notes: Confirm length and fitting type to match compressor

parts.name: Pressure air gun
parts.notes: For blowing down machines and cleaning

parts.name: Pressure washer
parts.notes: For machine cleaning — confirm pressure rating

parts.name: Water hose
parts.notes: To connect to pressure washer — confirm length

parts.name: Spanners 32/34/36mm (set)
parts.notes: Open/ring combo — for heavy equipment fasteners

parts.name: Under coat paint
parts.notes: For repair finishing protection — confirm colour

issueReports.title: RO plant and site electrical infrastructure items
issueReports.description: Electrical items required for RO (reverse osmosis) plant and general site electrical works. These are site utility items — NOT related to heavy machine rectification. Should be tracked separately from machine PRs.
issueReports.symptoms: RO plant / site electrical system requires cabling and protection components.
issueReports.solutionNotes: Confirm exact site location and specific specs for each item. Treat as a site infrastructure job, not a fleet maintenance job.

parts.name: RO plant cable
parts.notes: Confirm cable size and length for RO plant connection

issueReports.resolutionNotes: Site utility — keep separate from machine issue tracking
